steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0919.055945.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0919.055945 company name test' company using filter
Verify: confirmation question contains correct company name
Verify: the success alert appears after deleting the company
Verify: the deleted company is no longer present on the page
